revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{Catlink|6世紀の詩人|8世紀の詩人}} [[Category:各世紀の詩人|07]] [[Category:7世紀の人物|ししん]]」

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:refreshing categories falsely categorized as uncategorized]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Removing from [[Category:Adding Category to uncategorized categories]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "refreshing categories falsely categorized as uncategorized" to "qq"
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:7世紀の詩人]] [[ar:Category:شعراء القرن 7]] [[bn:Category:৭ম শতাব্দীর কবি]] [[es:Category:Poetas del siglo VII]] [[fa:Category:شاعران سده ۷ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Poète du VIIe siècle]] [[it:Category:Poeti del VII secolo]] [[ko:Category:7세기 시인]] [[pl:Category:Poeci VII wieku]] [[pt:Category:Poetas do século VII]] [[ru:Category:Поэты VII века]] [[tr:Category:7. yüzyıl şairleri]] [[ur:Category:ساتویں صدی کے شعراء]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:7th-century_Japanese_poets]].

revision.comment: Bot: overwrite with content from en‑wiki

Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Bot: add [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6300199)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Portal|Biography|Poetry}}
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{wikidata link|Q6300199}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:7th-century poets]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:7th-century poems]]
[[Category:7th-century writers| Poets]]
[[Category:Medieval poets|07]]
[[Category:Poets by century|07]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=7th-century_poets here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
